summary: Comprehensive testing of Bode Diagram Analyzer app completed. Backend APIs 100% passing (8/8 tests). Frontend fully functional with all 4 tabs working correctly. Simulation, analysis, and export features all operational.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper testID attributes for testing
Backend uses scipy correctly for transfer function analysis
Frontend uses React Native components properly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
API integration between frontend and backend working properly
Conditional rendering for margin pills is correct (only show when values are not null)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses default transfer function G(s) = (s + 1.2) / (s² + 0.45s + 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs return correct data structure. Frontend tabs navigate correctly and display simulation results. Gain/phase margin pills only show when values are finite (not null/infinite), which is correct behavior for certain transfer functions.

backend_tests.analyze_default_tf: PASS - Returns frequencies, magnitude_db, phase_deg, poles, zeros, is_stable, margins, order
backend_tests.analyze_invalid: PASS - Returns error for all-zero coefficients
backend_tests.export_csv: PASS - Returns base64 CSV with correct headers and data
backend_tests.export_csv_invalid: PASS - Returns error for invalid transfer function
backend_tests.export_pdf: PASS - Returns base64 PDF starting with %PDF
backend_tests.export_pdf_invalid: PASS - Returns error for invalid transfer function

function_tab.numerator_inputs: PASS - All 4 coefficient inputs visible and working
function_tab.denominator_inputs: PASS - All 5 coefficient inputs visible and working
function_tab.api_integration: PASS - Makes POST /api/analyze and stores result

analyze_tab.magnitude_chart: PASS - Bode magnitude plot renders with SVG
analyze_tab.phase_chart: PASS - Bode phase plot renders with SVG
analyze_tab.gain_margin_pill: CONDITIONAL - Only shows when gain_margin_db is not null (correct behavior)
analyze_tab.phase_margin_pill: CONDITIONAL - Only shows when phase_margin_deg is not null (correct behavior)
analyze_tab.unity_gain_pill: CONDITIONAL - Only shows when gain_crossover_freq is not null (correct behavior)

stability_tab.pole_zero_map: PASS - SVG visualization with poles (X) and zeros (O)
stability_tab.poles_table: PASS - Shows real and imaginary values for all poles
stability_tab.zeros_table: PASS - Shows real and imaginary values for all zeros
stability_tab.system_health: PASS - Shows STABLE/UNSTABLE with color coding
stability_tab.gain_margin_display: PASS - Shows ∞ dB for infinite margin
stability_tab.phase_margin_display: PASS - Shows ∞ deg for infinite margin

config_tab.reset_button: PASS - Reset to Default button visible
